overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The sequence transitions from indoor corridors and stairwells to open plazas with massive digital billboards, then through bustling market streets and narrow alleyways dense with holographic signage and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor building corridor with vending area

events.description: approaching stairwell entrance at end of corridor

agents.ego_description: following a white-haired character through a teal-lit corridor with mesh windows overlooking the city

notable_agents.action: white-haired character walking ahead through the corridor

entered.detail: tall vending machine with 'BIG' text and colorful graphics
metal mesh windows showing neon-lit cityscape outside
horizontal fluorescent light fixtures mounted on walls

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in an indoor corridor with teal artificial lighting, following a character past vending machines. The corridor features mesh windows on the right revealing the neon-lit city outside. The camera moves steadily forward toward a stairwell entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell and covered pedestrian walkway

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs following a new character in a purple jacket
passing through covered walkway with other pedestrians visible ahead

agents.ego_description: following a character with purple hair and a purple jacket down multiple flights of stairs and through a covered walkway

notable_agents.action: character with purple hair and metallic purple jacket walking down stairs

entered.detail: metal handrails along the concrete stairwell walls
bright linear fluorescent tubes illuminating the stairwell
red vending machine with 'FREE CITIES' text visible at stairwell landing

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete stairwell with overhead fluorescent lighting, following a character in a purple jacket. The environment is enclosed with metal railings, transitioning into a covered walkway where other pedestrians are visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with digital billboards and street market

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with massive digital billboards and neon signage
entering denser market area with food stalls and vendors on both sides
camera begins following a different character with cat ears into a narrow alley

agents.ego_description: navigating through a bustling night market following first a purple-jacketed character then switching to follow a character with cat ears and white shorts

notable_agents.action: character with cat ears and white crop top walking through market crowd

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboard displaying 'WET DREAM' text with colorful graphics
large red billboard with '3MOUTHS 1DESIRE' text and character image
street food vendors with cooking equipment and neon lighting
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the street
bright red vending machine with 'FREE CITIES' and military graphics

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast urban plaza dominated by towering digital billboards advertising 'WET DREAM' and '3MOUTHS 1DESIRE'. The camera moves through a bustling night market with food stalls, steam vents, and red paper lanterns. The environment transitions from open plaza to denser market streets before following a new character with cat ears toward a narrow alley entrance.

events.description: entering narrow winding alley with dense pink and cyan neon signage

agents.ego_description: following the cat-eared character through narrow alleyways lined with neon-lit storefronts and sitting vendors

notable_agents.action: two vendors sitting on a bench outside a storefront

entered.detail: green neon sign reading 'ESOTERICA' above a doorway
building facade illuminated with bright pink neon vertical strips
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting pink and blue neon lights
green neon sign with 'XXX' and 'Barely Legal' text

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through narrow, winding alleyways bathed in intense pink and cyan neon light. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant signage including an 'ESOTERICA' storefront and 'XXX' neon signs. The atmosphere is dense and intimate compared to the open plaza, with vendors sitting along the walls and the cat-eared character navigating the confined space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sterile indoor corridor into the overwhelming neon saturation of a dense urban night market. It begins in a teal-lit hallway past vending machines, moving steadily forward until it descends a concrete stairwell with fluorescent lighting and metal railings. As the camera emerges from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast plaza dominated by towering digital billboards and a bustling market filled with steam vents and red paper lanterns. The environment then shifts from the open square into narrower market streets, following a character with cat ears toward a confined alleyway. Finally, the shot winds through tight, atmospheric corridors where wet pavement reflects intense pink and cyan neon signs and storefronts.
